title: Fancy Hats
body:
- Fancy Hats is a server-side mod that adds many hats for cosmetic use. but it is still in beta. the mod adds:
- Cotton
- Cotton plans
- Cloth  (obtained by right-clicking the sewing machine with cotton)
- fancy and normal sewing buttons
- stable yarn
- cotton leaves
- cotton tree
- cotton candy
- sewing machines
- hats currently in the mod:
- Tophat+colors
- straw hat
- halo
- sunglasses
- masks
- Santa hat
- and some easter egg ones.
- hats can be put on by right-clicking the hat in the Hotbar
  
Please keep in mind that the mod is only in beta and more hats will probably be added.

Have fun
